info.title: Gando Partner API
info.description: API for **rental management software** and **multi–rental-operator platforms** integrating Gando on behalf of linked rental operators. Use **`gando_pk_`** keys (`x-api-key` or `Authorization: Bearer`) on `/api/partner/*`.

tags.name: Partner API
tags.description:
## Partner API vs rental operator API

These routes live under `/api/partner/*` and use **partner API keys** only. They are **not** the same as rental operator (loueur) API keys under `/api/cautions`, `/api/clients`, etc.

### Authentication (partner keys)

- Keys are issued by Gando and always start with the prefix **`gando_pk_`**.
- Send the raw key in either:
  - Header **`x-api-key: gando_pk_…`**, or
  - Header **`Authorization: Bearer gando_pk_…`**
- Missing key or wrong prefix → **401** `error.code`: **`missing_api_key`**.
- Unknown key → **401** `error.code`: **`invalid_api_key`**.
- Revoked key → **401** `error.code`: **`api_key_revoked`**.

### Error responses (ErrorEnvelope)

All documented 4xx/5xx responses use the same JSON shape (`#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope`):

```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "invalid_request",
    "message": "Human-readable error message.",
    "requestId": "req_abc123",
    "details": { "field": "status" }
  }
}
```

### Idempotency-Key (mutating POST)

Optional header on **`POST /api/partner/deposits`**, **`POST /api/partner/clients`**, **`POST /api/partner/deposits/{id}/capture`**, and **`POST /api/partner/deposits/{id}/cancel`**. Send a **UUID v4** per logical operation. Within **24 hours**, repeating the same key with the **same JSON body** returns the **cached HTTP status and response** (no duplicate side effects). Reusing the key with a **different body** returns **409** with `error.code`: `idempotency_key_conflict`. Invalid key format → **400** with `error.code`: `invalid_idempotency_key`. Requires **`REDIS_URL`** on the server; if Redis is unavailable while the header is sent → **503** with `error.code`: `redis_unavailable`.

### curl (partner key)

```bash
curl -sS -X GET "https://gando.app/api/partner/deposits?page=1&limit=20" \
  -H "x-api-key: gando_pk_YOUR_PARTNER_KEY"
```

```bash
curl -sS -X GET "https://gando.app/api/partner/deposits?page=1&limit=20" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer gando_pk_YOUR_PARTNER_KEY"
```

### Create client then deposit (recommended flow)

```bash
curl -sS -X POST "https://gando.app/api/partner/clients" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "x-api-key: gando_pk_YOUR_PARTNER_KEY" \
  -d '{
    "account_id": "acct_rental_operator_uuid",
    "email": "tenant@example.com",
    "first_name": "Jean",
    "last_name": "Dupont"
  }'
```

Then reuse the returned client `id` as optional `client_id` when creating a deposit.

### Create a deposit (full example)

```bash
curl -sS -X POST "https://gando.app/api/partner/deposits" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "x-api-key: gando_pk_YOUR_PARTNER_KEY" \
  -d '{
    "account_id": "acct_rental_operator_uuid",
    "amount": 800,
    "rental_contract": "CTR-2026-042",
    "contract_start_at": "2026-04-01T00:00:00.000Z",
    "contract_end_at": "2026-04-10T23:59:59.000Z",
    "client_id": "cli_123",
    "inline_redirect": true,
    "return_url": "https://partner.example/checkout/complete"
  }'
```

### JavaScript (fetch) — create + redirect

```javascript
const BASE = "https://gando.app";
const PARTNER_KEY = process.env.GANDO_PARTNER_KEY; // gando_pk_…

const res = await fetch(`${BASE}/api/partner/deposits`, {
  method: "POST",
  headers: {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "x-api-key": PARTNER_KEY,
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
    account_id: "acct_rental_operator_uuid",
    amount: 800,
    rental_contract: "CTR-2026-042",
    contract_start_at: "2026-04-01T00:00:00.000Z",
    contract_end_at: "2026-04-10T23:59:59.000Z",
    client_id: "cli_123",
    inline_redirect: true,
    return_url: "https://partner.example/checkout/complete",
  }),
});
const json = await res.json();
if (!json.success) throw new Error(json.error);
const { deposit_url } = json.data;
if (deposit_url) window.location.assign(deposit_url);
```

`deposit_url` is only returned when `inline_redirect` is `true`. After the tenant finishes on Gando, they are sent to `return_url` with query params **`caution_id`** and **`caution_status`** (`secured` | `declined` | `abandoned`). Always confirm the final state with **webhooks** (subscribe under **`/api/partner/webhooks`** — see **Partner webhooks** tag) or **GET /api/partner/deposits/{id}**.

### Webhooks — `partner_context` on caution events

When a deposit was created through the Partner API, webhook payloads (`caution.status_changed` wildcard or any of the specific `caution.activated` / `caution.captured` / `caution.expired` / `caution.cancelled`) may include **`data.partner_context`**:

- `partner_id` — Gando partner id
- `partner_name` — display name
- `external_id` — your rental-operator / account identifier on the link, or `null`

Schema reference: `#/components/schemas/WebhookCautionStatusChangedEvent` (field `data.partner_context`).

### Verify webhook HMAC (Node.js)

Use the **same** signing rules as rental-operator webhooks (`X-Gando-Signature`, `X-Gando-Timestamp`, payload `timestamp.rawBody`). See the **Webhooks** tag description in this document for full HMAC examples (Node, Python, PHP, Go).

```javascript
import crypto from "node:crypto";

export function verifyGandoWebhook(rawBody, signature, timestamp, secret) {
  if (!signature?.startsWith("sha256=")) return false;
  const signedPayload = `${timestamp}.${rawBody}`;
  const expected =
    "sha256=" +
    crypto.createHmac("sha256", secret).update(signedPayload).digest("hex");
  const a = Buffer.from(signature);
  const b = Buffer.from(expected);
  return a.length === b.length && crypto.timingSafeEqual(a, b);
}
```

### HTTP status codes (Partner API)

| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| **401** | Missing partner key, invalid or revoked `gando_pk_` key |
| **403** | Partner is not allowed to use this rental operator `account_id` / deposit |
| **404** | Unknown deposit id, capture not found, etc. |
| **409** | Idempotency key conflict (`idempotency_key_conflict`) or future linking conflicts |
| **422** | Semantic validation failure (reserved; many cases still return **400** today) |
| **429** | Rate limited (middleware: 200 req/min per IP+path on `/api/*`; `Retry-After` header) |
| **400** | Invalid JSON body, query params, or business rule (e.g. capture amount) |
| **500** / **502** | Server or upstream payment-processor errors |

Rental-operator tokens (`gando_…` without `_pk_`) and session cookies are documented under **Deposits** / **Clients** / **Webhooks** — do **not** use them for `/api/partner/*`.

tags.name: Partner webhooks
tags.description:
## Partner webhooks

Register **HTTPS endpoints** that receive JSON events for your entire partner integration (same `gando_pk_` authentication as `/api/partner/*`). Use this instead of polling **`GET /api/partner/accounts`** when you need the Gando **`account_id`** as soon as a rental operator completes partner connect (signup or login with signed `partner_connect`).

### Authentication

Send your partner API key with **`x-api-key: gando_pk_…`** or **`Authorization: Bearer gando_pk_…`** (same as other Partner API routes).

### Events

- **`rental_operator.linked`** — Fired when a rental operator account is linked to your partner via connect. Payload includes Gando `account_id`, your `external_id` from the connect URL, and `partner_id`.
- **`caution.status_changed`** — Wildcard. Delivered for every deposit status transition (same JSON shape as rental-operator webhooks: `#/components/schemas/WebhookCautionStatusChangedEvent`), including optional `data.partner_context` when the deposit belongs to a linked rental operator.
- **`caution.activated`** — Specific event. Delivered only when a deposit transitions to `active`.
- **`caution.captured`** — Specific event. Delivered only when a deposit transitions to `captured`.
- **`caution.expired`** — Specific event. Delivered only when a deposit transitions to `close` (natural end of contract).
- **`caution.cancelled`** — Specific event. Delivered only when a deposit transitions to `cancelled` (manual cancellation).

When a subscription includes both the wildcard and a specific event, **the most specific subscribed event wins** for that transition (single delivery per endpoint). The `event` field of the payload reflects the chosen event so consumers can branch on it directly.

### Signing and headers

Identical to rental-operator webhooks: **`X-Gando-Signature`** (`sha256=<hex>`), **`X-Gando-Timestamp`** (unix seconds), **`X-Gando-Event`** (event name). Verify HMAC-SHA256 over `<timestamp>.<rawBody>` with your **webhook signing secret** (returned once when you create the endpoint). See the **Webhooks** tag in this document for full verification examples (Node.js, Python, PHP, Go).

### Retries

Failed deliveries are retried on a backoff schedule by Gando’s webhook retry job (same behaviour as rental-operator webhook deliveries).

PartnerApiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
PartnerApiKeyAuth.description: Partner API key (`gando_pk_` prefix). Required for all documented `/api/partner/*` routes.

PartnerBearerAuth.description: Same partner key as `PartnerApiKeyAuth`, sent as `Authorization: Bearer gando_pk_…`.

event.description: Webhook event name. Reflects the most specific subscribed event matched by this transition.

rental_contract.description: Rental contract reference set by the rental operator, if any

client.description: Client information if a client is attached to the deposit

external_id.description: Partner-side rental-operator / account identifier when available

partner_context.description: Partner context for cautions created through Partner API Key flow. Present only for partner-linked cautions.

account_id.description: Gando rental operator account id — use as `account_id` in Partner API calls

external_id.description: Your external id from the partner connect URL, if provided

linked_at.description: When the link was established (server time)

code.description: Machine-readable error code — exhaustive enum in OpenAPI (`PartnerErrorCode`).

requestId.description: Request correlation ID — include in support tickets.

PartnerCreateClientBody.description: Create a client on a linked rental operator account. Shape depends on `clientType`. Idempotent by email within the account.

accountId.description: Target rental operator account id (required on create)

phone.description: Phone number in E.164 or local format

siren.description: French SIREN (9 digits), for business clients

accountId.description: Target rental operator account id (required on create)

phone.description: Phone number in E.164 or local format

siren.description: French SIREN (9 digits), for business clients

companyName.description: Legal or trade name (required for professionnel)

ProfessionnelClient.description: Create a business client. `companyName` is required.

PartnerClientPatchBody.description: Partial update of a partner-accessible client. At least one field is required.

ParticulierPartnerClientPatch.description: Patch an individual client. At least one field is required.

companyName.description: Updated company name (required when setting `clientType` to professionnel)

ProfessionnelPartnerClientPatch.description: Patch a business client. At least one field is required; `companyName` required when `clientType` is professionnel.

get.description: Returns rental operator accounts linked to your partner. Filter with `status`: `active` (default), `revoked`, or `all`.

schema.description: Filter linked accounts: `active` (default, operable links), `revoked` (disconnected), or `all`.

parameters.description: Filter linked accounts: `active` (default, operable links), `revoked` (disconnected), or `all`.
parameters.name: status

account_id.description: Gando rental operator account id. Use as `account_id` in Partner API calls.

external_id.description: Your external id from partner connect, when provided at link time

company_name.description: Legal or trade name of the rental operator

email.description: Primary contact email for the rental operator

linked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the partner link was created

status.description: Partner link status: `active` (operations allowed) or `revoked` (403 on deposits)

accounts.description: Linked rental operator accounts for this partner

total.description: Total number of accounts matching the filter

400.description: Invalid query (e.g. invalid `status`)

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Forbidden — partner cannot access this resource.

409.description: Conflict — e.g. idempotency key reused with a different body.

delete.description: Revokes the link between your partner and the given rental operator `account_id`. Further deposit operations for that account return **403** until re-linked.

revoked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the link was revoked

400.description: Bad request — invalid parameters or business rule.

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Partner is not linked to this account

409.description: Conflict — e.g. idempotency key reused with a different body.

get.summary: List clients across linked rental operator accounts
get.description: Returns paginated clients for all active linked rental operator accounts, or for a specific linked account when `accountId` is provided.

schema.description: Filter clients to this linked rental operator account

parameters.description: Filter clients to this linked rental operator account
parameters.name: accountId

schema.description: Case-insensitive search on name, email, or company

parameters.description: Case-insensitive search on name, email, or company
parameters.name: search

clientType.description: Type of client: particulier (individual) or professionnel (business)

companyName.description: Company name (required if clientType is professionnel)

updatedAt.description: Last update date and time (ISO 8601 format)

400.description: Invalid query parameters

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: `accountId` is not linked to this partner

409.description: Conflict — e.g. idempotency key reused with a different body.

x-codeSamples.label: SDK

post.summary: Create a client for a linked rental operator account
post.description: Creates a client and returns its id. This id can then be sent as optional `client_id` in `POST /api/partner/deposits`. This endpoint is idempotent by email within account: when a client already exists, it returns 200 with the existing id.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional UUID v4 for request deduplication (24h). Same key + same body replays the cached response; same key + different body returns 409 `idempotency_key_conflict`.

id.description: Created or existing client id (use as `client_id` on deposits)
Created or existing client id (use as `client_id` on deposits)

400.description: Validation error (missing account id, missing names, invalid email, etc.)

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Partner is not linked to this account

409.description: Idempotency key already used with a different request body (`error.code`: `idempotency_key_conflict`)

503.description: Redis unavailable while Idempotency-Key was sent

patch.description: Updates a client that belongs to one of the partner's linked rental operator accounts.

clientType.description: Type of client: particulier (individual) or professionnel (business)

companyName.description: Company name (required if clientType is professionnel)

updatedAt.description: Last update date and time (ISO 8601 format)

400.description: Invalid body

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Partner cannot access this client

409.description: Conflict — e.g. idempotency key reused with a different body.

x-codeSamples.label: SDK

post.summary: Create a deposit for a linked rental operator
post.description:
Creates a deposit on behalf of a linked rental operator (`account_id`). Optionally set `client_id` to attach an existing client from the same rental operator account.

**Inline redirect:** set `inline_redirect: true` and `return_url` to receive `deposit_url` and send the tenant straight to Gando. Same redirect query parameters as the rental operator API: `caution_id`, `caution_status`.

**Idempotency-Key:** optional UUID v4 header; replays return the same **201** and `data.id` within 24h when the body is unchanged.

See the **Partner API** tag for curl/fetch examples.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional UUID v4 for request deduplication (24h). Same key + same body replays the cached response; same key + different body returns 409 `idempotency_key_conflict`.

account_id.description: Rental operator account id. Must be actively linked to your partner.

amount.description: Deposit amount in euros (70–2500, same rules as the rental operator API)

rental_contract.description: Your rental contract or booking reference for reconciliation

contract_start_at.description: Contract start date (ISO 8601 or parseable date string)

contract_end_at.description: Contract end date. Must be on or after `contract_start_at`

client_id.description: Optional client id from `POST /api/partner/clients` on the same rental operator account

inline_redirect.description: When true, response includes `deposit_url` for immediate tenant redirect

return_url.description: HTTPS return URL (localhost allowed). Required with inline checkout; Gando appends `caution_id` and `caution_status` query params

status.description: Status of the caution: pending (waiting for next step), incomplete (client journey not finished), active (payment authorized), processing (being processed), captured (payment captured), close (caution closed by natural expiration / end of contract), cancelled (caution cancelled manually before activation or while active), payment_issue (payment issue at fee payment), capture_issue (capture/recovery issue)

deposit_url.description: Tenant checkout URL when `inline_redirect` was true on create

400.description: Validation or creation error (JSON body, dates, amount limits, etc.)

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Partner is not linked to `account_id`

409.description: Idempotency key already used with a different request body (`error.code`: `idempotency_key_conflict`)

503.description: Redis unavailable while Idempotency-Key was sent

get.description:
Lists deposits across **all active** rental operator accounts linked to your partner.

Pass **`account_id`** to return only deposits for that single linked rental operator account.

Repeat query parameter **`status`** to filter by several statuses (e.g. `?status=pending&status=active`).

When `include_counts=true` **and** `account_id` is set, the response includes per-status counts for that account.

schema.description: When set, only deposits for this linked rental operator account (`account_id`)

parameters.description: When set, only deposits for this linked rental operator account (`account_id`)
parameters.name: account_id

schema.description: Field to sort deposit results by

parameters.description: Field to sort deposit results by
parameters.name: sortBy

items.description: Status of the caution: pending (waiting for next step), incomplete (client journey not finished), active (payment authorized), processing (being processed), captured (payment captured), close (caution closed by natural expiration / end of contract), cancelled (caution cancelled manually before activation or while active), payment_issue (payment issue at fee payment), capture_issue (capture/recovery issue)

schema.description: Repeat `status` to filter by multiple deposit statuses

parameters.description: Repeat `status` to filter by multiple deposit statuses
parameters.name: status

schema.description: Filter deposits assigned to this client id

parameters.description: Filter deposits assigned to this client id
parameters.name: client_id

schema.description: Filter: contract/start date on or after (ISO 8601)

parameters.description: Filter: contract/start date on or after (ISO 8601)
parameters.name: start_at_from

schema.description: Filter: contract/start date on or before (ISO 8601)

parameters.description: Filter: contract/start date on or before (ISO 8601)
parameters.name: start_at_to

schema.description: Filter: expiry date on or after (ISO 8601)

parameters.description: Filter: expiry date on or after (ISO 8601)
parameters.name: expires_at_from

schema.description: Filter: expiry date on or before (ISO 8601)

parameters.description: Filter: expiry date on or before (ISO 8601)
parameters.name: expires_at_to

reference.description: Unique reference code for the caution

amount.description: Amount of the caution in euros

status.description: Status of the caution: pending (waiting for next step), incomplete (client journey not finished), active (payment authorized), processing (being processed), captured (payment captured), close (caution closed by natural expiration / end of contract), cancelled (caution cancelled manually before activation or while active), payment_issue (payment issue at fee payment), capture_issue (capture/recovery issue)

clientId.description: ID of the client associated with the caution (optional, can be null)

accountId.description: ID of the account that owns the caution

stripePaymentIntentId.description: Payment processor reference for the deposit authorisation (when present)

stripePaymentMethodId.description: Payment processor reference for the saved card on the caution (when present)

startAt.description: Start date and time of the caution (ISO 8601 format)

expiresAt.description: Expiration date and time of the caution (ISO 8601 format)

updatedAt.description: Last update date and time (ISO 8601 format)

total.description: Total deposits for the filtered account

counts.title: PartnerDepositListCounts
counts.description: Present only when `include_counts=true` and `account_id` is set

400.description: Invalid query parameters

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: `account_id` is not linked to this partner

409.description: Conflict — e.g. idempotency key reused with a different body.

get.description: Returns the same deposit shape as the rental operator API (`CautionItem` fields). Deposit must belong to a linked rental operator.

reference.description: Unique reference code for the caution

amount.description: Amount of the caution in euros

status.description: Status of the caution: pending (waiting for next step), incomplete (client journey not finished), active (payment authorized), processing (being processed), captured (payment captured), close (caution closed by natural expiration / end of contract), cancelled (caution cancelled manually before activation or while active), payment_issue (payment issue at fee payment), capture_issue (capture/recovery issue)

clientId.description: ID of the client associated with the caution (optional, can be null)

accountId.description: ID of the account that owns the caution

stripePaymentIntentId.description: Payment processor reference for the deposit authorisation (when present)

stripePaymentMethodId.description: Payment processor reference for the saved card on the caution (when present)

startAt.description: Start date and time of the caution (ISO 8601 format)

expiresAt.description: Expiration date and time of the caution (ISO 8601 format)

updatedAt.description: Last update date and time (ISO 8601 format)

400.description: Bad request — invalid parameters or business rule.

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Deposit not accessible for this partner

409.description: Conflict — e.g. idempotency key reused with a different body.

patch.summary: Update deposit (change client or cancel pending payment)
patch.description:
Exactly one of:
- `client_id` — reassign client (must belong to the deposit's rental operator account)
- `action: "cancel"` — void the in-flight deposit payment and set status to `cancelled`

client_id.description: Reassign deposit to another client on the same rental operator account

action.description: Void the in-flight deposit payment and set status to `cancelled` (not the same as POST …/cancel which closes an active deposit)

400.description: Invalid body or deposit state (e.g. no pending payment to cancel)

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Deposit not accessible for this partner

409.description: Conflict — e.g. idempotency key reused with a different body.

delete.description: Same semantics as rental-operator delete: remove when allowed, otherwise archive. Response uses top-level **`message`** (`Deleted` or `Archived`), not `data`.

400.description: Bad request — invalid parameters or business rule.

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Forbidden for this deposit

409.description: Conflict — e.g. idempotency key reused with a different body.

post.description: Charge the tenant card for the given amount in **cents** (min 1000). Requires a payment method on the deposit and capture-ready payout configuration on the linked rental operator's Gando account.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional UUID v4 for request deduplication (24h). Same key + same body replays the cached response; same key + different body returns 409 `idempotency_key_conflict`.

amount.description: Amount to capture in EUR cents (minimum 1000 = €10.00)

reason.description: Optional reason shown in capture records and reporting

status.description: Capture outcome status from the payment processor

400.description: Invalid amount, no payment method, payout configuration not ready, etc.

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Deposit not accessible for this partner

409.description: Idempotency key already used with a different request body (`error.code`: `idempotency_key_conflict`)

503.description: Redis unavailable while Idempotency-Key was sent

get.summary: Get latest capture for a deposit
get.description: Prefers the latest **paid** capture; if none, returns the most recent capture of any status. **404** when no capture exists yet.

feeCents.description: Gando collection fee in EUR cents

netCents.description: Net amount credited to the rental operator in EUR cents

400.description: Bad request — invalid parameters or business rule.

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Deposit not accessible for this partner

404.description: No capture found for this deposit

409.description: Conflict — e.g. idempotency key reused with a different body.

post.summary: Send deposit link to multiple emails
post.description: Sends the deposit completion link to each address. Per-recipient success is returned in `results`; failed sends do not fail the whole request.

emails.description: Recipient email addresses for the deposit completion link

link.description: Deposit completion URL sent to recipients

400.description: Invalid body

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Deposit not accessible for this partner

409.description: Conflict — e.g. idempotency key reused with a different body.

post.description: Single-recipient variant of `/email`. Returns provider `messageId` when available.

email.description: Single recipient for the deposit completion link

success.description: Whether the email was accepted by the provider

messageId.description: Transactional email provider message id, when available

400.description: Invalid body

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Deposit not accessible for this partner

409.description: Conflict — e.g. idempotency key reused with a different body.

post.description: Sets the deposit status to `close` (end-of-contract closure) and may send the closed-caution email. **Different from** `PATCH …` with `action: cancel` which voids the in-flight deposit payment and sets status to `cancelled`.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional UUID v4 for request deduplication (24h). Same key + same body replays the cached response; same key + different body returns 409 `idempotency_key_conflict`.

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Deposit not accessible for this partner

get.description: Retrieve all configured webhook endpoints for the authenticated partner (`gando_pk_` key). Each item aggregates subscribed event types.

id.description: Partner webhook endpoint id; path parameter `{id}` in update/delete/test/deliveries routes

items.description: Partner webhook event types. `rental_operator.linked` fires when a rental operator account is linked to your partner via connect. The five caution events mirror rental-operator webhooks: `caution.status_changed` is the wildcard delivered for every status transition; `caution.activated` (-> active), `caution.captured` (-> captured), `caution.expired` (-> close, natural end of contract), `caution.cancelled` (-> cancelled, manual cancellation) are the specific events. When an endpoint subscribes to both the wildcard and a specific event, the most specific subscribed event wins for that transition (single delivery per endpoint).

events.description: Subscribed event types for this endpoint

data.description: Webhook endpoints configured for this partner
data.title: PartnerWebhookSubscriptionList

400.description: Bad request — invalid parameters or business rule.

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Forbidden — partner cannot access this resource.

409.description: Conflict — e.g. idempotency key reused with a different body.

post.description: Create a webhook URL and signing secret for this partner, and subscribe it to the requested event types. Returns the plain signing secret **exactly once**. Default `events` include all available events (`rental_operator.linked`, `caution.status_changed`, `caution.activated`, `caution.captured`, `caution.expired`, `caution.cancelled`) when omitted.

url.description: Destination URL (must start with http:// or https://)

items.description: Partner webhook event types. `rental_operator.linked` fires when a rental operator account is linked to your partner via connect. The five caution events mirror rental-operator webhooks: `caution.status_changed` is the wildcard delivered for every status transition; `caution.activated` (-> active), `caution.captured` (-> captured), `caution.expired` (-> close, natural end of contract), `caution.cancelled` (-> cancelled, manual cancellation) are the specific events. When an endpoint subscribes to both the wildcard and a specific event, the most specific subscribed event wins for that transition (single delivery per endpoint).

events.description: Event types to subscribe. Defaults to all partner events when omitted.

id.description: Partner webhook endpoint id (use as `{id}` in follow-up routes)

items.description: Partner webhook event types. `rental_operator.linked` fires when a rental operator account is linked to your partner via connect. The five caution events mirror rental-operator webhooks: `caution.status_changed` is the wildcard delivered for every status transition; `caution.activated` (-> active), `caution.captured` (-> captured), `caution.expired` (-> close, natural end of contract), `caution.cancelled` (-> cancelled, manual cancellation) are the specific events. When an endpoint subscribes to both the wildcard and a specific event, the most specific subscribed event wins for that transition (single delivery per endpoint).

secret.description: Plain signing secret. Returned only once at creation (store it securely).

post.description:
Sends a sample **`caution.activated`** payload to the endpoint URL. The endpoint must be subscribed to either `caution.activated` or the wildcard `caution.status_changed`.

Outbound payload schema reference: `#/components/schemas/WebhookCautionStatusChangedEvent` (see Models). The `data.rental_contract` field carries the partner-side contract id set by the rental operator.

Sample payload sent by this test and the production dispatcher:

```json
{
  "event": "caution.activated",
  "created_at": "2026-03-02T10:00:00.000Z",
  "data": {
    "id": "test_deposit_id",
    "reference": "GAN-TEST",
    "rental_contract": "CTR-TEST-2026",
    "status": "active",
    "previous_status": "pending",
    "amount_cents": 150000,
    "contract_start_at": null,
    "contract_end_at": null,
    "client": null,
    "partner_context": {
      "partner_id": "ptr_xxx",
      "partner_name": "Fleetee",
      "external_id": "fleet_operator_42"
    }
  }
}
```

statusCode.description: HTTP status code returned by your webhook URL
